security_review.reviewer: team-lead (manual adversarial pass; Codex unavailable due to usage cap)

findings.focus_area: a. Multi-device member safety (leaf node iteration)
findings.detail: getPubkeyLeafNodeIndexes returns all leaves for target pubkey; each leaf gets its own Remove proposal in removeProposals array. Correct even for multi-device members.

EpochResolver enforces deterministic ordering (created_at, id) + promise-chain serialization. Losing canceller's commit silently dropped; UI converges via groupDataVersion bump. Silent-success raceDetected:true path safe.
Fixed: resolveCancellerDisplay(msg.senderPubkey, ...) uses protocol-enforced sender pubkey, never attacker-controlled structured.by field. Announcement source is now trustworthy.

findings.focus_area: d. Batching Remove + UpdateMetadata in single commit
findings.detail: Both Remove proposals and UpdateMetadata proposal are in single extraProposals array fed to mlsGroup.commit(). No bare Remove; no orphaned admin list.
Plain objects {proposalType:3, remove:{removed:leafIndex}} match spec and ts-mls acceptance. Previous nested-array bug resolved.

low_severity_notes: None blocking. All five focus areas verified green.

notes: Playwright serial test suite (8 tests, 14.3s): USER_A creates group; USER_B briefly boots to publish KeyPackage then context closed; USER_A invites USER_B by npub; verifies pending badge (member-pending-{pk.slice(0,8)}) and cancel button (cancel-invite-{pk.slice(0,8)}); clicks Cancel and confirms (cancel-invite-confirm-{pk.slice(0,8)}); verifies USER_B row (member-item-{pk.slice(0,8)}) absent from member list after navigation reload; verifies invite-cancelled-announcement in chat; verifies USER_A can send new chat message. All ACs (CPI-22 through CPI-24) covered. Security review (5 focus areas) passed. Round 1 identified ProposalAction nesting bug; architect fix + Round 2 re-verification confirmed 8/8 passing.
